data.description:
Cardano founder Charles Hoskinson has theorized that the concept of a four-year cycle for Bitcoin is fading away after holding sway for nearly 13 years.
source: https://zycrypto.com/cardanos-hoskinson-says-bitcoins-four-year-cycle-is-dead-predicts-lower-price-spikes-and-dips/

data.title: Roger Ver's Settlement Claims Unconfirmed Amid Ongoing Fraud Allegations
data.description:
The alleged $48 million settlement between Roger Ver and the DOJ regarding fraud and tax evasion charges remains unverified, with ongoing legal proceedings.
source: https://coincu.com/367744-roger-ver-fraud-charges-update

data.title: 'Bitcoin Jesus' Roger Ver Agrees to Pay $48 Million to End US Tax Fraud Case: NYT
data.description:
Crypto entrepreneur Roger Ver—known as "Bitcoin Jesus"—will have his tax evasion case dropped as part of a tentative deal, the New York Times reports.
source: https://decrypt.co/343702/roger-bitcoin-jesus-ver-pay-48-million-end-us-tax-fraud-case

data.title: Roger Ver reaches $48M tax settlement with US prosecutors: NY
data.description:
The crypto investor once known as “Bitcoin Jesus” will avoid trial under a deferred prosecution deal
source: https://blockworks.co/news/roger-ver-tax-settlement

data.title: BCP becomes first Peruvian bank to offer regulated crypto access
data.description:
Peru’s largest bank, BCP, has launched a pilot crypto platform authorized by the national regulator, allowing select clients to buy and hold Bitcoin and USDC.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bcp-first-peruvian-bank-regulated-crypto?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss%3Ftimestamp%3D1760041832204%26cb%3Dnocwp0&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Roger Ver Reaches Agreement with U.S. Department of Justice
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Roger Ver, known as 'Bitcoin Jesus,' has reached an agreement with the U.S. Department of Justice. The agreement involves the dismissal of fraud and tax evasion charges against him. In exchange, Ver is required to pay a fine of $48 million.

data.title: BNB Meme Coins Crash Up to 95% After CZ Dismisses ‘Endorsement’ Claims
data.description:
BNB Chain’s memecoin rally has sharply reversed, with tokens falling as much as 95% after CZ clarified his posts are not trading endorsements, triggering a massive market sell-off.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/bnb-meme-coins-crash-up-to-95-after-cz-dismisses-endorsement-claims/

data.title: Bitdeer targets top five crypto mining capacity as supplier pivots on slow demand
data.description:
Bitdeer Technologies Group, the Nasdaq-listed crypto mining firm founded by industry veteran Jihan Wu, is shifting its strategy from hardware supplier to major Bitcoin miner as demand for mining rigs weakens. In a move that signals both confidence and necessity, the company has quadrupled its proprietary mining capacity over the past year and now aims […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bitdeer-crypto-mining-on-slow-demand/

data.title: U.S. President Donald Trump’s Approval Rating Sinks – Shutdown Standoff Fuels Backlash
data.description:
The approval rating of U. S. President Donald Trump is reaching new lows, according to a Reuters/Ipsos poll published this week. Donald Trump Sees Steep Disapproval in New PollConducted between October 3 and October 7, the poll finds that 40% of Americans approve of Trump, while 58% disapprove. According to Reuters, the majority of Americans disapprove of […]
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/u-s-president-donald-trumps-approval-rating-sinks/
